final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing food photography close-up of a Japanese ramen bowl.

Style/medium: needs a "美食摄影" (food photography) aesthetic — references in the spirit of Saveur magazine editorial photography, Japanese 食べログ (Tabelog) food documentation culture, 2010s Instagram flat-lay ramen photography movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a close-up shot with chopsticks lifting noodles from the bowl
Subject: must include ramen noodles, rich tonkotsu broth, chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, nori, and green onions
Scene/backdrop: must be a shallow depth-of-field background with steam rising from the bowl
Lighting/mood: needs an appetizing, steamy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include the visual texture of rich broth, tender chashu, runny egg yolk, and steam wisps
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
